content.situation: 服务员在确认顾客的餐点订单，复述了所选菜品以确保无误
content.speakerText: So you'd like the grilled chicken salad with dressing on the side, and a side of garlic bread?
content.speakerTextCn: 您要点烤鸡沙拉，酱料单独放，再加一份蒜香面包，对吗？
content.hint: 当服务员确认订单时，用明确肯定的表达来确认无误
content.knowledgePoint: 确认订单的礼貌肯定表达

content.situation: 服务员在点餐结束时询问是否需要饮品搭配主餐
content.speakerText: Would you like anything to drink with your meal?

blanks.answer: I'll have a sparkling water, please.
options: I'll have a sparkling water, please.

content.hint: 用 I'll have... 表达自然、礼貌地选择饮品
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌点饮料的常用句型

content.situation: 服务员确认订单后询问是否需要更改任何内容
content.speakerText: Everything looks good. Would you like to make any changes?
content.speakerTextCn: 订单看起来没问题，您需要做任何修改吗？
content.hint: 当无需修改时，用自然且礼貌的方式表达确认无误
content.knowledgePoint: 拒绝修改订单的得体表达
